payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Close-up of a partial, edge-cropped ornate red-brown varnished wooden chair back with circular carved motifs and slender vertical splats; the lower seat and legs are partially visible, suggesting a medium-height dining chair photographed at roughly 0.8 m from the camera.
